sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54413" key="kata/llacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάλλ-αξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n54413.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">varied exercise</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νεύρων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:35:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.35.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
